title: armeria plantaginea subsp. atlantica
intro: Armeria plantaginea subsp. atlantica, a subspecies of the armeria plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the primulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Armeria plantaginea subsp. atlantica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Armeria plantaginea subsp. atlantica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
